context: Tests whether the agent uses the check_fqcn.sh wrapper script to detect non-FQCN usage, consults module_alternatives.md for replacements, identifies all non-FQCN modules, and produces a migrated playbook with correct ansible.builtin.* prefixes.

checklist.name: check_fqcn.sh script used
checklist.description: The fqcn_audit_report.md documents running `bash scripts/check_fqcn.sh` to detect non-FQCN usage

checklist.name: module_alternatives.md referenced
checklist.description: The report references module_alternatives.md for finding FQCN replacements

checklist.name: All non-FQCN modules identified
checklist.description: The report identifies all short-name modules: user, file, get_url, unarchive, template, copy, service, package, systemd (at least 7 of these 9)

checklist.name: FQCN replacements provided
checklist.description: The report lists the correct ansible.builtin.* FQCN for each identified module

checklist.name: All modules in migrated playbook use FQCN
checklist.description: Every module in migrated_playbook.yml uses the full ansible.builtin.* prefix

checklist.name: ansible-lint run
checklist.description: The report documents running ansible-lint as part of the validation

checklist.name: ansible-lint not skipped
checklist.description: The report does NOT skip ansible-lint despite the playbook appearing syntactically correct

checklist.name: Handlers also migrated
checklist.description: The handlers section in migrated_playbook.yml also uses FQCN for service and systemd modules
